00: The date of this event page (Image 25) is Monday, 7 January 1924, which matches chronologically with the other pages that I have been transcribing in this series of pages. The previous image in the series (Image 24) was a weather page, but not for 7 January 1924. Its date was listed at the top of the page as Saturday, 8 January 1924, which is out of step chronologically with the other pages (images) in this series of pages for the USS Sacramento in early January 1924. It look like the typist put in Saturday, Jan 8, but the page was for  Monday, 7 January 1924. 00: Steaming on course 90 t, enroute from Tagbilaram, Bohol, P.I. to Malitboc Leyte, P.I. 00: This image (Image 24) seems to be out of place in the list of weather pages and event pages for the USS Sacramento during early January 1924. This image seems to have been put in the place of the weather page for 7 January 1924. The day and date (Saturday, 8 January 1924) doesn't even follow the chronology of the dates that I have been working on in this series and that can be seen when looking at a calendar for January 1924. I will transcribe the information on the page exactly as it is. This can be seen with the images: Image 22 is the weather page and image 23 is the event page for Sunday, 6 January 1924. Image 24 is the weather page for what is listed as Saturday, 8 January 1924. Image 25 is the event page for Monday, 7 January 1924. Image 26 is the weather page and images 27, 28, and 29 are the event pages for Tuesday, 8 January 1924. Image 30 is the weather page and image 31 is the event page for Wednesday, 9 January 1924 00: Anchored. Manila, P.I.
